# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:meiji_civil_war_effects = { # Executed from on_revolution_start
	# Root = Country
	# scope:target = Uprising country
	if = {
		limit = {
			var:emperor_var ?= {
				NOT = {
					owner ?= ROOT
				}
			}
		}
		var:emperor_var ?= { # Get back here
			transfer_character = ROOT
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			has_variable_list = daimyos_list
		}
		every_in_list = {
			limit = {
				AND = { # Daimyo on the opposing side whose states did not defect
					NOT = {
						owner ?= ROOT
					}
					var:daimyo_var ?= { # Their state region
						any_scope_state = {
							owner ?= ROOT
						}
					}
				}
			}
			variable = daimyos_list
			transfer_character = ROOT # Get back here
		}
		every_in_list = {
			limit = {
				AND = { # Daimyo on this side whose states did defect
					owner ?= ROOT
					var:daimyo_var ?= { # Their state region
						NOT = {
							any_scope_state = {
								owner ?= ROOT
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
			variable = daimyos_list
			transfer_character = scope:target # Get outta here
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			scope:target ?= {
				country_has_monarchy_law = yes
			}
		}
		scope:target ?= {
			every_scope_character = {
				limit = {
					has_variable = daimyo_var
				}
				add_character_role = character_role_magnate # Restore Daimyo status manually
				if = {
					limit = {
						this.interest_group ?= {
							leader ?= {
								NOT = {
									has_variable = daimyo_var
								}
							}
						}
					}
					interest_group.leader ?= {
						remove_character_role = character_role_ig_leader
					}
					set_as_interest_group_leader = yes
					add_character_role = character_role_ig_leader
				}
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			scope:target ?= {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				var:civil_war_type_var ?= movement_type:movement_meiji_restorationist
			}
		}
		if = { # Sets up ruler of the restorationist coalition
			limit = {
				scope:target ?= {
					ruler ?= {
						is_historical = no # A historical non-daimyo is totally fine
						NOT = {
							has_variable = daimyo_var
						}
					}
				}
			}
			ordered_in_list = {
				limit = {
					scope:target ?= owner
				}
				variable = daimyos_list
				order_by = prominence
				position = 0
				add_character_role = character_role_ruler
			}
		}
		scope:target ?= {
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_isolationism
				}
				activate_law = law_type:law_sakoku
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_bakufu
					country_has_former_shogun_in_government = yes
					country_is_taikunate = yes
					sonnojoi_have_shojoi_ideology = yes
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = ep2_meiji.41 popup = yes }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOR = {
					has_law = law_type:law_bakufu
					country_is_taikunate = yes
				}
			}
			scope:target ?= {
				set_variable = sonnojoi_contrast_color # So that the Sonnojoi use a different colour than the Empire
			}
		}
	}
	if = {
		limit = {
			scope:target ?= {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				var:civil_war_type_var ?= movement_type:movement_tokugawa_loyalist
			}
		}
		scope:target ?= {
			activate_law = law_type:law_bakufu
			if = {
				limit = {
					has_law = law_type:law_peasant_levies
				}
				activate_law = law_type:law_warrior_caste
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				country_is_abolishing_bakufu = yes
			}
			currently_enacting_law = {
				ROOT = {
					activate_law = currently_enacting_law.type
				}
			}
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				NOT = {
					has_law = law_type:law_bakufu
				}
			}
			if = {
				limit = {
					any_character = { # This is a sin, but necessary
						has_variable = former_shogun_var # designates Taikun
					}
				}
				random_character = {
					limit = {
						has_variable = former_shogun_var # designates Taikun
					}
					if = {
						limit = {
							NOT = {
								scope:target ?= owner
							}
						}
						transfer_character = scope:target
					}
					set_character_as_ruler = yes
				}
			}
			trigger_event = { id = ep2_meiji.4 popup = yes }
		}
	}
	# AI Ezochi always sides with the Matsumae
	if = {
		limit = {
			exists = c:EZO
			c:EZO ?= { is_player = no }
		}
		if = {
			limit = {
				p:x40BDB8.state ?= {
					owner ?= scope:target
				}
				c:EZO ?= { top_overlord ?= ROOT }
			}
			scope:target ?= {
				transfer_subject = c:EZO
			}
			random_diplomatic_play = {
				limit = {
					is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_revolution
					initiator ?= {
						scope:target ?= this
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						initiator ?= {
							scope:target ?= this
						}
					}
					add_initiator_backers = { c:EZO }
				}
				add_war_goal = {
					holder = ROOT
					target_country = c:EZO
					type = annex_country
					primary_demand = yes
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				p:x40BDB8.state ?= {
					owner ?= ROOT
				}
				c:EZO ?= { top_overlord ?= scope:target }
			}
			ROOT ?= {
				transfer_subject = c:EZO
			}
			random_diplomatic_play = {
				limit = {
					is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_revolution
					initiator ?= {
						scope:target ?= this
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						initiator ?= {
							scope:target ?= this
						}
					}
					add_target_backers = { c:EZO }
				}
				add_war_goal = {
					holder = scope:target
					target_country = c:EZO
					type = annex_country
					primary_demand = yes
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = {
				c:EZO ?= {
					is_subject = yes
					OR = {
						c:EZO ?= { top_overlord ?= ROOT }
						c:EZO ?= { top_overlord ?= scope:target }
					}
				}
			}
			random_diplomatic_play = {
				limit = {
					is_diplomatic_play_type = dp_revolution
					initiator ?= {
						scope:target ?= this
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						c:EZO ?= { top_overlord ?= scope:target }
					}
					add_war_goal = {
						holder = ROOT
						target_country = c:EZO
						type = annex_country
						primary_demand = yes
					}
				}
				if = {
					limit = {
						c:EZO ?= { top_overlord ?= ROOT }
					}
					add_war_goal = {
						holder = scope:target
						target_country = c:EZO
						type = annex_country
						primary_demand = yes
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}
}
